message:
chore: add .codex/ and heaptrack profiling dumps to .gitignore

Ignore the Codex CLI config directory (.codex/) and heaptrack memory
profiling dumps (heaptrack.*.zst) that accumulate during development
and profiling sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -271,3 +271,9 @@ evidence/
 # Bare test binary at repo root
 /test
 .bench-history/
+
+# Codex CLI config directory
+.codex/
+
+# Heaptrack profiling dumps
+heaptrack.*.zst
